summary: TASK-183: Created marketing landing page design system — design tokens (landing-page.json with 15 sections, 160+ token leaves), CSS custom properties (landing-page-variables.css with 15 component selectors, 11 keyframe animations, responsive + reduced-motion media queries), and Tailwind theme extension (landing-page-theme.ts with colors, spacing, fontSize, borderRadius, boxShadow, animation, keyframes). Covers hero, nav, CTA buttons, feature cards, code demo, screenshot gallery, video embed, social proof/testimonials, stats bar, footer CTA, and footer. All 130 tests passing.
